description_long: This is an upright wooden piano with a dark brown, polished finish and a classic, slightly ornate design. The piano features a high back panel with three vertical insets and a broad, flat top surface. The front legs are turned and decorative, while the rear legs are simpler and more utilitarian. The keyboard area is not visible, suggesting the lid is closed or the keyboard is absent. The wood grain is visible throughout, and there are some lighter scuff marks on the top surface, indicating wear from use. No pedals, branding, or music stand are visible in any view.
description: A dark brown upright wooden piano with a high back panel, turned front legs, and a closed keyboard area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high back panel, broad top, and turned front legs; the keyboard area is closed or absent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the piano's depth, the curved side profile, and the continuous wood grain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless back panel and the simple rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same curved profile and wood texture.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Keyboard not visible; likely covered or absent, so layout cannot be determined.
